dr_chen: The air will be cooler. The fans never stop.
I designed the cooling system in 2019. I remember thinking it was beautiful.
I was thinking about heat dissipation. Not about what it was cooling.
maya: How far in before we hit resistance?
The network's already opening routes for us.
That signal from Vault 49 — it's still propagating.
The converted staff aren't fighting. They're stepping aside.
Someone left a door open inside the system.
dr_chen: She survived the secondary conversion attempt.

player_reads: Primary architect: Chen, Wei. Secondary: Voss, Elise.
Note: Phase 5 projections indicate 99.4% consensus within 18 months.
Note: 0.6% non-responsive. Recommend escalation protocol review.
maya: That's us. That's everyone like us.
dr_chen: And the system is deciding what to do with its margins.
jerome: We are children of God and we are not a margin.

maya: Whatever's running interference in the network — it's giving us the first move.

dr_chen: The core is past this room.
She's always there. She never left after the rollout.
I don't think she can leave anymore.
I think she and ELISE are the same thing now.
I don't know which one of them believes that.

maya: Third time we've beaten this model.
Something in the core architecture failed.
Third time apparently does the trick.
Part of its primary logic chip.
Don't ask me what it does. Ask Chen when we find him.
